description_long: A wooden serving board holds five pieces of salmon nigiri sushi, each featuring a slice of orange-pink salmon draped over a compact mound of white rice. The sushi pieces are neatly aligned in a row, showcasing the delicate marbling and subtle texture of the fish. Resting beside the sushi are a pair of black chopsticks with red tips, adding a touch of contrast and authenticity. A small, shallow bowl containing soy sauce and a few floating green scallion slices sits at one end of the board. The wooden board has a natural grain pattern, enhancing the presentation and evoking a traditional Japanese dining experience. The overall arrangement is clean, inviting, and visually balanced, suitable for a restaurant or urban food stall setting.
description: Five pieces of salmon nigiri sushi are arranged on a wooden board with chopsticks and a small bowl of soy sauce with scallions. The presentation is clean, traditional, and visually appealing.
description_view_0: Front view showing all five pieces of salmon nigiri aligned on the wooden board, with chopsticks and a soy sauce bowl visible to the left.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the height and shape of the sushi pieces, with the soy sauce bowl and chopsticks positioned at the far end.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backs of the sushi pieces, with chopsticks crossed and the soy sauce bowl on the right.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the sushi pieces from behind, with the soy sauce bowl and chopsticks on the left.
